name: Doha
industries: LNG and energy expansion, aviation, banking and national digital-government programmes drive certified project hiring.
intro: Doha's project pipeline did not stop with the World Cup — it changed shape. LNG expansion at Ras Laffan is the world's largest, Qatar's ministries are digitising services under a national programme, and the city keeps building out transport, health and education infrastructure. Employers from QatarEnergy to the banks screen project hires on certification because Doha's talent market is thin and international: the credential is the common yardstick. There are live online batches all year for Doha — pick a Saturday–Sunday weekend or a Wednesday–Thursday weekday cohort — each timed to fall within normal Doha working-day hours; the schedule below gives the precise local start and end for every date. Teaching is in English with a global cohort that mirrors Qatari workplaces. Invoices are employer-sponsorship ready. Then comes the follow-through: exam application guidance, realistic mock exams, and open trainer access for questions until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Doha?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 11:00 AM – 08:00 PM AST in Doha. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Doha?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Doha. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Qatar?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Qatar and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Doha sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Qatar accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Doha — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Doha: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
